title: ForgeMe
description: Synthetic dataset generator with injected anomalies. Describe your data in plain text, get a dataset with nulls, duplicates, outliers and more — ready for testing your pipelines.
hint1Desc: Choose from the sidebar: nulls, duplicates, outliers
hint2Desc: Set rows, format, and seed — or use Schema match to fit your real data
hint3Desc: Click Generate — click any row to inspect it in detail
hint4Desc: Download or send directly to AnalyzeMe
